reforms.description: The Turkish government is directing funds to finance R&D and modern infrastructure to enhance productivity in the agricultural sector, while also streamlining and targeting resources for innovation to enhance qualified personnel among SMEs as part of broader educational reforms.
reforms.package_name: Agricultural Innovation and Human Capital Development
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in R&D and human capital is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in the agricultural sector and among SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been put into action as part of the government's strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms involve significant but narrower changes aimed at enhancing R&D funding and human capital.
reforms.source_quote: Funds should be increasingly directed to finance R&D and modern infrastructure to boost productivity.

reforms.description: A Bill on Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) was presented to Parliament, aiming to eliminate discriminatory practices against foreign firms and streamline administrative procedures to enhance innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Eliminating discriminatory practices and streamlining procedures is expected to attract foreign investment, fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The bill has been presented to Parliament but not yet passed.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a structural change in the approach to foreign investment and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The Bill includes measures aimed at reducing discrimination between domestic and foreign firms.
